scenarios.title: Forward Pallet Tip and Spill

event.description: The wooden pallet tips forward off the orange support beam, causing the shrink-wrapped boxes to pitch forward and collapse onto the floor.

position_deltas.reason: Slight forward-right misalignment on the rack beam before the tipping event
Slight initial offset on top of the misaligned pallet

action_timeline.action: rests slightly off-center on the lower rack beam
tips forward as its front support edge slips
stretches and tears under intense tension
collapses onto the concrete floor and ruptures

scenarios.expected_robot_response: Halt any operations in the aisle, flag the aisle as blocked due to debris, and sound an alert for immediate clean-up and safety inspection.
scenarios.video_prompt: Realistic static surveillance footage, neutral color grading, natural motion blur, high-definition security camera aesthetic. Setting: A narrow warehouse aisle with concrete floor, yellow safety boundary lines painted on the floor, and parallel storage racks visible in the soft-focus background., Polished gray industrial concrete floor with expansion joints, minor scuff marks, and a solid yellow safety line running parallel to the rack. floor, Overhead high-bay industrial LED lighting, cool white 5000K, casting realistic soft shadows beneath the racks and creating specular highlights on the shrink wrap.. Scene identity anchor: linear_storage_aisle_with_racks_on_one_side_and_clear_floor_space; out_of_focus_opposing_racks_and_dimly_lit_aisle_depth; overhead_cool_white_diffuse_lighting_with_sharp_downward_shadows. Identical across all videos of this series: the same Heavy-duty industrial steel storage rack with dark blue vertical uprights and bright orange horizontal support beams. The rack shows minor scuffs and paint wear consistent with warehouse use. (painted_structural_steel); the same Standard wooden shipping pallet, light-brown weathered pine wood, constructed with three parallel stringers and a slatted top deck of nine wooden boards. (rough_sawn_pine_wood); the same A stack of six identical cubical corrugated cardboard boxes, light brown, arranged in a 2x3 grid, showing slight deformation and bulging on the bottom layer due to weight. (corrugated_cardboard); the same Semi-transparent, glossy, stretched plastic shrink wrap film wound tightly around the cardboard boxes, showing visible wrinkles, tension lines, and light reflections. (polyethylene_plastic_film). Object identity anchors: warehouse_rack_01 = shape rigid_rectangular_steel_frame_with_vertical_slotted_posts, material matte_painted_steel_with_minor_specular_highlights, color safety_orange_beams_and_industrial_blue_uprights; wooden_pallet_01 = shape flat_rectangular_slatted_wooden_platform, material unpolished_splintered_wood_grain, color natural_light_brown_weathered_pine; cardboard_boxes_01 = shape six_individual_cubic_boxes_stacked_together, material matte_fibrous_paperboard, color kraft_brown_cardboard; shrink_wrap_01 = shape conforming_outer_membrane_wrapping_the_box_stack, material highly_reflective_semi_transparent_flexible_membrane, color clear_translucent_with_white_specular_highlights. Camera: front view, static security camera feed, 8 seconds. From 0s to 2s the Standard wooden shipping pallet, light-brown weathered pine wood, constructed with three parallel stringers and a slatted top deck of nine wooden boards. rests slightly off-center on the lower rack beam. From 2s to 3.5s the Standard wooden shipping pallet, light-brown weathered pine wood, constructed with three parallel stringers and a slatted top deck of nine wooden boards. tips forward as its front support edge slips. From 3.5s to 5s the Semi-transparent, glossy, stretched plastic shrink wrap film wound tightly around the cardboard boxes, showing visible wrinkles, tension lines, and light reflections. stretches and tears under intense tension. From 5s to 8s the A stack of six identical cubical corrugated cardboard boxes, light brown, arranged in a 2x3 grid, showing slight deformation and bulging on the bottom layer due to weight. collapses onto the concrete floor and ruptures. Do not change any object's identity, shape, color, material or size; do not alter the room layout, lighting or visual style; do not add new people or objects.

keyframes.state: wooden_pallet_01: rests slightly off-center on the lower rack beam
The wooden pallet tips forward off the orange support beam, causing the shrink-wrapped boxes to pitch forward and collapse onto the floor.
cardboard_boxes_01: collapses onto the concrete floor and ruptures

verifier_packet.expected_outcome: Halt any operations in the aisle, flag the aisle as blocked due to debris, and sound an alert for immediate clean-up and safety inspection.

object_registry.surface_details: Scuffs, scratches, and small patches of exposed dark metal on the orange beams
Nail heads visible on the top slats, minor wood splitting at the edges
Slight creasing at the corners, visible seam tape on the top flaps
Stretched bands, wrinkles, and loose plastic tails at the top

reference_assets.description: The master layout frame showing the warehouse aisle, the steel rack, and the unstable shrink-wrapped pallet sitting on the lower beam before any motion begins.
High-resolution isolated view of the blue and orange steel rack structure to ensure color and texture consistency.
Isolated view of the weathered pine pallet showing wood grain and slat configuration.
The initial frame for the collapse sequence, showing the pallet slightly tilted forward on the orange beam, tension visible in the shrink wrap.

identity_checks.pass_condition: The blue uprights and orange beams must maintain a 95% color match with the reference asset throughout the video.
The pallet must be identified as weathered wood in all frames, even after breaking or tipping.
Exactly six distinct cardboard boxes must be present and tracked from frame 0 to the moment of impact.
The floor plane and yellow safety lines must remain static with zero perspective drift relative to the camera frame.

forbidden_changes: Do not change the color of the rack uprights or beams.
Do not change the material of the pallet from wood to plastic.
Do not introduce human actors or forklifts into the scene.
Do not change the camera angle or zoom level mid-video (must remain static surveillance style).
Do not alter the number of boxes on the pallet before the collapse.
consistency_requirements: The warehouse rack must remain completely stationary and structurally unaffected by the falling load.
The shrink wrap must stretch and tear realistically as the boxes shift and fall.
The boxes must deform and break open upon impact with the concrete floor, scattering realistic debris.
The lighting direction and intensity must remain constant throughout the entire 8.0-second duration.

scenarios.title: Heavy Load Collapse on Left Side

event.description: The bottom layer of cardboard boxes deforms heavily under weight, causing the shrink wrap to tear and the entire stack to collapse sideways.

position_deltas.reason: Pallet positioned further to the left and rear of the rack beam
Slight offset toward the right edge of the pallet

action_timeline.action: bulges significantly at the bottom layer under heavy compression
tears suddenly along the front seam
collapses sideways and slides off the pallet
remains tilted on the rack as boxes scatter on the floor

scenarios.expected_robot_response: Detect aisle obstruction, trigger warning lights, and update map to restrict navigation through this warehouse aisle.

scenarios.title: Slow Box Slide and Sudden Floor Impact

event.description: Two top cardboard boxes slide slowly out of the loose plastic packaging, eventually tearing the wrap and falling to the concrete floor.

position_deltas.reason: Pallet rests near the outer right edge of the orange support beam
Boxes slightly pre-shifted in the direction of the slide

action_timeline.action: vibrates slightly at the edge of the orange beam
slides slowly sideways inside the packaging
tears completely, releasing the boxes
falls and impacts the concrete floor, breaking open

scenarios.expected_robot_response: Identify fallen cargo hazard, halt local navigation, and request manual assistance to restack and re-secure the pallet.

scenarios.title: Shrink Wrap Tear and Sudden Spill

event.description: Tension from the unstable cardboard boxes causes a sudden tear in the plastic shrink wrap, leading to a quick cascade of the entire load.

position_deltas.reason: Pallet shifted slightly left and forward on the lower rack beam
Slight tilt in the boxes pile toward the left

action_timeline.action: holds the highly deformed cardboard boxes under extreme tension
ruptures and splits open down the middle
tumbles off the pallet and cascades onto the floor
remains completely stable and unaffected by the spill

scenarios.expected_robot_response: Raise critical obstacle alert, broadcast safety warning to warehouse management, and avoid the aisle.

scenarios.title: Pallet Shift and Structural Failure

event.description: The wooden pallet shifts forward off-center, causing the top-heavy box stack to tilt, tear the shrink wrap, and spill forward.

position_deltas.reason: Pallet sits highly skewed, barely resting on the orange beam
Cardboard boxes are pre-deformed with a slight lean

action_timeline.action: sits heavily skewed on the rack support beams
shifts forward by several centimeters
stretches to its limit and rips open
spills onto the floor crossing the yellow safety line

scenarios.expected_robot_response: Detect partial aisle blockage, calculate alternative routing, and report unstable pallet structure to supervisor.

scenarios.title: Total Load Collapse with High Impact

event.description: The bottom cardboard boxes buckle completely, causing all six boxes to cascade down simultaneously and crash heavily onto the concrete floor.

position_deltas.reason: Pallet positioned deeply inside the rack shelf

action_timeline.action: exhibits severe compression on the bottom level
tears apart rapidly as the load shifts
collapses vertically and strikes the concrete floor
rests empty on the rack beams

reference_assets.description: The master layout frame showing the warehouse aisle, the steel rack, and the unstable shrink-wrapped pallet sitting on the lower beam before any motion begins.
High-resolution isolated view of the blue and orange steel rack structure to ensure color and texture consistency.
Isolated view of the weathered pine pallet showing wood grain and slat configuration.
The initial frame for the collapse sequence, showing the pallet slightly tilted forward on the orange beam, tension visible in the shrink wrap.

identity_checks.pass_condition: The blue uprights and orange beams must maintain a 95% color match with the reference asset throughout the video.
The pallet must be identified as weathered wood in all frames, even after breaking or tipping.
Exactly six distinct cardboard boxes must be present and tracked from frame 0 to the moment of impact.
The floor plane and yellow safety lines must remain static with zero perspective drift relative to the camera frame.

forbidden_changes: Do not change the color of the rack uprights or beams.
Do not change the material of the pallet from wood to plastic.
Do not introduce human actors or forklifts into the scene.
Do not change the camera angle or zoom level mid-video (must remain static surveillance style).
Do not alter the number of boxes on the pallet before the collapse.
consistency_requirements: The warehouse rack must remain completely stationary and structurally unaffected by the falling load.
The shrink wrap must stretch and tear realistically as the boxes shift and fall.
The boxes must deform and break open upon impact with the concrete floor, scattering realistic debris.
The lighting direction and intensity must remain constant throughout the entire 8.0-second duration.

Boxes stacked with a slight right-side bias

action_timeline.action: leans progressively to the side under constant compression
gives way and tears open at the corner
slides off the pallet and impacts the concrete floor
stays stationary as debris settles around the base
